description.en: TheElementorDocumentwhose bounds are used as the bounding box when testing for intersection. If norootvalue was passed to the constructor or its value isnull, the top-level document's viewport is used.

description.en: Returns aDOMRectReadOnlyfor the intersection observer's root.

excerpt.es: Returns aDOMRectReadOnlyfor the intersection observer's root.
excerpt.en: Returns aDOMRectReadOnlyfor the intersection observer's root.

description.en: An offset rectangle applied to the root'sbounding boxwhen calculating intersections, effectively shrinking or growing the root for calculation purposes. The value returned by this property may not be the same as the one specified when calling the constructor as it may be changed to match internal requirements. Each offset can be expressed in pixels (px) or percentages (%). The default is "0px 0px 0px 0px".
